description: Kisan Mitra production disease detection confidence band configuration. DO NOT MODIFY without creating a new release.

inference_transform.note: Defined in disease_transforms.py. Must NOT be changed without retraining the model.

HIGH.action: CNN diagnosis shown to farmer without warning

MODERATE.action: CNN diagnosis shown with verification warning
MODERATE.warning_message: Moderate confidence prediction. Please verify using additional images.

LOW.action_with_crop: Route to AI Vision fallback using the farmer-supplied crop name
LOW.action_without_crop: confidence_failed — ask farmer to specify crop name

REJECT.action: Hard confidence_failed — ask farmer to upload a clearer image
REJECT.error_message: Unable to identify disease accurately. Please upload a clearer image of the affected leaf.

leaf_color_masks.green: G > R*1.02 AND G > B*1.02 AND G > 35
leaf_color_masks.brown: R > G*1.05 AND G > B*1.05 AND R > 40
leaf_color_masks.yellow: R > 90 AND G > 90 AND B < R*0.75

order: 2. unsupported_crop_bypass: if crop not in CNN classes -> AI Vision fallback
3. legacy_routing: is_legacy_request() for crops in legacy keyword list (apple, peach, cherry, etc.)
5. confidence_band_routing: apply band logic to top-1 confidence
